query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN imageUrl IS NOT NULL AND imageUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as con_imagen, SUM(CASE WHEN imageUrl IS NULL OR imageUrl = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sin_imagen FROM recipes;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3N8WHcqSjo6gJV1.8cb8a16f7acb --database ndjzMo7PxeapbzLjBHjsKj --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN imageUrl IS NOT NULL AND imageUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as con_imagen, SUM(CASE WHEN imageUrl IS NULL OR imageUrl = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sin_imagen FROM recipes;
